Issue: Does not specify the minimum resource requirements for CPU, memory, and storage
Correction: The framework shall require a minimum of 2 CPU cores, 4GB of RAM, and 10GB of available storage.

Issue: Does not specify how data privacy and security will be ensured
Correction: The application shall use encryption (e.g., AES-256) for all data transfers and storage to ensure data privacy and security.

Issue: Does not specify the minimum hardware requirements for the product environment
Correction: The system shall support hardware with at least 2 CPU cores, 4GB of RAM, and 10GB of available storage.

Issue: Does not specify the minimum hardware requirements for the development environment
Correction: The development environment shall support hardware with at least 2 CPU cores, 4GB of RAM, and 10GB of available storage.

Issue: Does not provide detailed use cases
Correction: The document shall include detailed use cases with actors, preconditions, main flow, and postconditions for each use case.

Issue: Non-functional requirements do not specify measurable criteria
Correction: The system shall respond to user commands within 2 seconds 95% of the time.

Issue: Non-functional requirements do not specify security measures
Correction: The system shall implement role-based access control (RBAC) to restrict access to sensitive data.

Issue: Non-functional requirements do not specify scalability requirements
Correction: The system shall be able to handle up to 10,000 concurrent users without performance degradation.

Issue: Non-functional requirements do not specify reliability requirements
Correction: The system shall have an uptime of 99.9% over a 12-month period.

Issue: Non-functional requirements do not specify maintainability requirements
Correction: The system shall allow for the addition of new features with minimal changes to existing code.

Issue: Does not specify the format for the help command output
Correction: The help command shall output information in plain text format.

Issue: Does not specify the format for the generate command output
Correction: The generate command shall output information in JSON format by default.

Issue: Does not specify the format for the analyse command output
Correction: The analyse command shall output information in JSON format by default.

Issue: Does not specify the format for the config command output
Correction: The config command shall output information in plain text format.

Issue: Test scenarios do not include expected results
Correction: Each test scenario shall include expected results for validation.

Issue: Test scenarios do not cover edge cases
Correction: Test scenarios shall include edge cases such as invalid inputs and system failures.
